description_long: This cafe is a large, modern, rectangular building with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The facade features a mix of materials, including wood paneling, concrete, and large glass windows, providing a contemporary and inviting appearance. The front area includes a shaded outdoor seating section with tables and umbrellas, adjacent to a rectangular swimming pool and a small circular hot tub. The structure incorporates landscaped elements such as trees and planters, enhancing its urban appeal. The rear and sides of the building are more utilitarian, with a visible garage area and additional parking spaces. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular cafe with wood, concrete, and glass elements, featuring outdoor seating, a pool, and landscaped accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, outdoor seating with umbrellas, pool, and landscaped planters.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the garage, parking area, and minimal windows, with some landscaping visible.
description_view_2: Street-facing view with a prominent wood-paneled facade, covered parking, and main entrance area.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing the flat roof, circular windows, and the pool area extending along the side.
